sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41514" key="e)pi/fqoros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίφθορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (φθορά)</foreign> <sense id="n41514.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deadly,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φάρμακον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:132" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.132</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
